---
title: "Week 13 Guide"
subtitle: "Cumulative Application of Chapters 1–8"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

Week 13 is a cumulative application of everything from Chapters 1--8. You will work with encounter data from a regional tabletop RPG league, applying the combining, joining, and reshaping operations from Chapter 8 alongside the cleaning and analysis skills from prior weeks.

**Assignment:**

- Here is the link to the **[Week 13 Assignment](../../assignments/week-13/index.qmd)**.

## Concepts reinforced this week

This week applies the Chapter 8 operations from the Week 12 demo: combining DataFrames from multiple sources, joining tables on a shared key, and reshaping between wide and long format. Chapter 7 cleaning tools are part of the workflow where the data requires them.

## Week 13 tasks

1. Complete the **Week 13 Assignment** (RPG league season recap).
2. Record and submit your video reflection.

## Knowledge goals for Week 13

By the end of Week 13, you should be able to:

* combine two DataFrames with `pd.concat()` and explain what happens to the index when two sources are stacked
* choose a join type for `pd.merge()` and justify that choice based on what the analysis requires from unmatched rows
* explain what happens to rows with no matching key value in each of the four join types
* reshape a wide DataFrame to long format with `pd.melt()` and explain what changed structurally and why it matters for analysis
* identify and resolve inconsistencies in a combined dataset using Chapter 7 string and type tools
